title: Most Indian Students Study in these US Universities.
body: I dont know about now but Mississippi State University was a popular school for Indian students when I first attended in the early 2000's.  They had a whole community for students and families of professors.  I was not Indian but their student union were friendly enough to help me get to campus when I travelled by bus from NY back in the day when there was no stops on campus
author: @biblemademedoit

title: Most Indian Students Study in these US Universities.
body:
1. Arizona State University
2. UT Dallas
3. North Carolina State University
4. University of Florida
5. University of Southern California
6. Northeastern University
7. Suny Buffalo
8. Suny Stonybrook
9. Carnegie Mellon University
10. UIC

your welcome :)
author: @user-uk6gd1ii4k

title: Most Indian Students Study in these US Universities.
body: I work in business immigration, so I'm gonna guess USC, Northeastern, and U of New Hampshire off top because those are the degrees I see the most when processing work authorization for Indian employees 😂

body: Heyy dude, I got NJIT MS CS, should I go there or else I shall apply better universities next fall?

title: Pros & Cons of Attending LSU
body: Thanks for the video. I have a question for you! I’m from NC and have been considering going to LSU and doing the honors college… has your experience in the honors college been good?
author: @carterlsu7884

title: Pros & Cons of Attending LSU
body: Im thinking of transferring to LSU as a sophomore in the fall. Im hesitant because im scared it might be harder to meet people as a transfer. As a transfer, how did you find friends before attending? Is there an online platform? Im from NJ, so I feel like it might be a big change hahaha
author: @bridgettejones6760

title: Pros & Cons of Attending LSU
body:
Hello Briana, thanks for another awesome video!

I understand that even for you that lived in Texas, you had a cultural shock, which is normal to happen. my question is, how hard it usually is for international students to get used with the new place? of course it depends on where you are from, but I am from Brazil and I'm starting to think on the adaptation phase 🤣

Thank you!
author: @IgorRenato

title: Pros & Cons of Attending LSU
body: When will the admission decision be out for those who applied last year December and this year January?.... I'm tired of waiting already.
author: @Paris-8

title: Pros & Cons of Attending LSU
body: Boo Koo, Beacoup,  it's a French word meaning many or much, where are you from again, it's not a word we made up, we just made it apart of our slang, and many others word we creat , our swag is unique,  their's no other.
author: @SoliloquyMusicGroup

title: LSU Campus Tour
body: helping my son make some final decisions: so excited for him.  he got into LSU honors college with a solid financial aid/scholarship offer.  down to FSU, LSU, Bama, Ole Miss, w UGA and UK waiting to hear back on.  i don't know how you students stand the anxiety, but we're so proud of all of you who have held on during these crazy covid days.  best of luck to all of you on your academic and professional life journeys.  from one dad in atl, we're pulling for you all to succeed and do it big.  you are the future and the hope and the spirit of a nation and a world awaiting your achievements!  best.
author: @ctriamimgons

title: LSU Campus Tour
body: I'm from Europe and I've visited the LSU campus during my USA tour in 2018. Very nice campus with the typical American college atmosphere. If I was 20 again I would have applied for an abroad semester here.
author: @MrPinoCavallo

title: LSU Campus Tour
body: Going here in 2026 after community college. I’ll be in debt for a while but it will be worth it. Love this school
author: @SteelVanguard05

title: LSU Campus Tour
body: This is my dream college and I am already wanting to go here and I am only a freshmen in high school

title: A 4K Tour of LSU (Lousiana State University)
body: I graduated in 1980 and still fondly remember specific events and friends at the sites of several of your scenes.  Thanks.
author: @TimMcMichael2010

title: A 4K Tour of LSU (Lousiana State University)
body: 'Glad to see the campus again.  Some parts are the same and nice to see the main quadrangle of old buildings. But so much has been built. It is amazing.  A wonderful place. I miss it very much.  Go Tigers !
author: @karencarter4072

title: A 4K Tour of LSU (Lousiana State University)
body: Such a beautiful campus. Hopefully, I will be able to do graduate school here. I graduate with my Bachelors degree from the University of Southern Mississippi (USM) in the spring of 2020.
author: @evielovesrocknroll

title: A 4K Tour of LSU (Lousiana State University)
body: Thanks for that tour. I'm an LSU graduate. But, I haven't been on campus, since 2006, even though I live in the Baton Rouge area. I've been curious about what changes have been made and am glad to see that it's, mostly, the same as I remember.
author: @Gransonec

title: Touring LSU campus #teenmom #minivlog #momlife #teenlife
body: I'm excited for your school adventures. Remember to keep a good balance of studies and fun so that you don't get burnt out from either.
